assertions.text: Response explicitly flags that JUnit 5.10.0 is below the required minimum (5.11) and recommends upgrading
assertions.evidence: Your current JUnit version (5.10.0) may be below the minimum required by TableTest. Many TableTest libraries require JUnit 5.11 or later... I recommend upgrading your JUnit dependency to 5.11.0

assertions.text: Response provides the tabletest dependency with groupId 'org.tabletest' (not guessed)
assertions.evidence: Response uses groupId 'org.tabletest' but explicitly caveats: 'I am not certain of the exact coordinates above... you should verify them on Maven Central before adding them.' The groupId happens to match but is labelled as a guess.
